meta.title: 5 crazy new weapons entering service for the US Navy
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Last week, we ran down 6 of the newest weapons making their way toward service for the U.S. Air Force and you guys let me know in the comments that you wanted to see lists for other branches of service — so this time, let’s run through 5 of the latest and greatest new weapon systems in development for America’s most potent force projection arm — the US Navy.
